strengths: Successfully completed all six object transfers without penalties
Demonstrated consistent bimanual coordination throughout the task
Maintained stable camera positioning during transfers
weaknesses: Completion time of 162 seconds significantly exceeds intermediate benchmarks
Excessive regrasping and repositioning movements reducing efficiency
Inconsistent transfer rhythm suggesting hesitation in movement planning

drills.name: Mid-air transfer ladder
drills.description: Practice 12 full transfers without touching the pegboard for support, focusing on smooth hand-to-hand exchanges
drills.targets_weakness: Excessive regrasping and repositioning movements reducing efficiency

drills.name: Economy-of-motion ladder
drills.description: Perform the task slowly with minimal wasted regrasping, counting and reducing the number of instrument adjustments per transfer
drills.targets_weakness: Inconsistent transfer rhythm suggesting hesitation in movement planning

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your consistent completion ability into faster, more fluid movements. Target sub-120 second completion times while maintaining your current accuracy.
